name: DVWA Basics
description: Introductory lab using the Damn Vulnerable Web Application Docker environment.

objectives.title: HTTP banner scan succeeds against the lab target

walkthrough.title: Start the lab environment
walkthrough.body: Run `lab start dvwa-basics` to launch the DVWA container, or `use docker_environments/dvwa` then `run`.

walkthrough.title: Open DVWA
walkthrough.body: Browse to http://127.0.0.1/ and sign in with admin / password.

walkthrough.title: Complete the setup wizard
walkthrough.body: If prompted, finish the DVWA database setup via /setup.php before running exercises.

walkthrough.title: Validate progress
walkthrough.body: Run `lab score dvwa-basics` or `lab run dvwa-basics --skip-start` after the environment is up.
